# castai_edge_configuration_default (Resource)

Manages the default CAST AI Edge Configuration for an edge location. This resource sets an existing edge configuration as the default for the specified edge location.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) CAST AI cluster ID
- `configuration_id` (String) ID of the edge configuration to set as default
- `edge_location_id` (String) Edge location ID
- `organization_id` (String) CAST AI organization ID

### Read-Only

- `cloud_provider` (String) Cloud provider type (gcp, aws, oci, custom)
- `id` (String) Terraform resource ID (the configuration_id)
- `name` (String) Name of the edge configuration
